76301.subject: рҹҹӘ The next great commodity?
76301.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)

Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

==вҖңOur knowledge of optimizing capacity in energy networks will allow us to revolutionize the bandwidth market.вҖқ==
_вҖ” _==_Enron letter to shareholders, 1999_==_ _



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/4a3ac7ac-0fc0-4f52-8ffb-98b793bc94f2/image.png?t=1784669995)
Caption: 

# The next great commodity?

Enron, remembered, of course, for turning electricity into a tradeable commodity, had designs on making lots of other things tradeable, too: weather forecasts, water rights, carbon emissionsвҖҰ even advertising minutes.

But their biggest target was the thing that seemed in shortest supply circa 1999: internet bandwidth.

The CEO of UUNET, then the largest provider of bandwidth at the time, predicted that internet traffic would continue to rise exponentially. вҖңThree years from now,вҖқ he [said](https://catalogimages.wiley.com/images/db/pdf/0471434051.ch01.pdf?utm_source=chatgpt.com) in 1997, вҖңwe expect our network to be 1,000 times the size it is today.вҖқ

It fell well short of that, unfortunately. But the forecast was directionally correct: demand for bandwidthВ  вҖ” the capacity to move data across the internet вҖ” doubled approximately every year from about 1998 to 2002. 

Either way, bandwidth looked destined to become one of the world's most valuable resources вҖ” and Enron saw an unprecedented opportunity to make it tradeable.В 

CEO Jeffery Skilling believed that turning the informal community of bandwidth buyers and sellers into a commoditized market would transform Enron from вҖңThe WorldвҖҷs Leading Energy CompanyвҖқ into вҖңThe WorldвҖҷs Leading Company.вҖқ

(Which really would have been something.)

As Andrew Schwartz [wrote](https://brie.berkeley.edu/sites/default/files/wp152.pdf?utm_source=chatgpt.com) in a study of EnronвҖҷs plans, the company first tried to make the data packets that move information over the internet tradeable.

That proved infeasible as packets resist nearly every pre-requisite for becoming a commodity: there was no practical way to standardize them, deliver them, or verify their quality.

So Enron chose instead to create a market for bandwidth вҖ” the capacity to send those packets over the internet.

In practice, that meant standardizing contracts for transmission: a

76300.subject: Ethics Deal Revives CLARITY Vote Odds
76300.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

Here are the biggest stories in crypto and DeFi:

* **[Crypto rallies](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/crypto-rallies-as-reported-ethics-deal-revives-odds-of-clarity-act-senate-vote)**[ as ethics deal revives CLARITY vote odds](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/crypto-rallies-as-reported-ethics-deal-revives-odds-of-clarity-act-senate-vote) 

* **[Telegram ](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/durov-says-telegram-will-ship-native-gram-wallet-to-a-billion-users)**[to ship native Gram wallet ](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/durov-says-telegram-will-ship-native-gram-wallet-to-a-billion-users)

* **[Movement Labs](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/movement-labs-files-for-chapter-11-bankruptcy)**[ files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/movement-labs-files-for-chapter-11-bankruptcy)

* **[S&P and Pantera](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/s-p-and-pantera-launch-revenue-screened-digital-asset-index)**[ launch digital-asset index](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/s-p-and-pantera-launch-revenue-screened-digital-asset-index)

* **[Morpho](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/morpho-launches-fixed-rate-lending-protocol-midnight-on-base)**[ launches fixed-rate lending protocol](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/morpho-launches-fixed-rate-lending-protocol-midnight-on-base)

* **[Lynq Partners With NONCO for 24/7 Institutional Stablecoin Liquidity](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/lynq-partners-with-nonco-to-enable-24-7-stablecoin-liquidity-for-institutions)**[ [Partner]](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/lynq-partners-with-nonco-to-enable-24-7-stablecoin-liquidity-for-institutions)

The crypto market-structure bill has spent months stuck on a single sticking point: an ethics provision. A reported deal to settle it sent prices higher.

[Crypto prices climbed](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/crypto-rallies-as-reported-ethics-deal-revives-odds-of-clarity-act-senate-vote) on Tuesday, with **bitcoin** reclaiming $66,000, after reports that the **White House** circulated agreed-upon ethics-provision language to Senate Republicans. The deal would remove the main obstacle that had stalled the **Digital Asset Market CLARITY Act**, reviving the odds of a floor vote before the August recess.

Markets are pricing the calendar here. A settled ethics provision clears the procedural blocker, but a floor vote before recess is a tight window, and the SEC-CFTC split still has to survive the text. The rally says traders now believe the bill has a real path this session вҖ” the follow-through is the vote itself.

**Read more below!**

76299.body:
Forbes P.M.

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Forbes


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Forbes

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ

Good evening, Startup Twenty uses AI models to run efficient cyberwarfare hacking campaignsвҖ”and its only customer is the Pentagon. The service can help the Department of Defense identify targets and conduct reconnaissance making processes that could take months or years much faster. вҖңWeвҖҷre trying to industrialize cyber warfare,вҖқ CEO Joseph Lin says. Learn more here. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads illustration by Macy Sinreich for Forbes; Images by Donald Iain Smith via Getty Images, Nelson Almeida via Getty Images The U.S. Bank Market Is A Fortress. NubankвҖҷs Billionaire CEO Has An Invasion Plan. Some analysts warn that the U.S. banking market is too competitive, but this CEO has built a $13 billion fortune proving the naysayers wrong. 76296.subject: рҹ”· The Daily: Crypto bill edges closer to a Senate vote
76296.body:
Jack Mallers leaves Twenty One as Strike exits Tether's three-way bitcoin merger | Washington judge blocks Kalshi's sports prediction markets over state gambling laws | UK parliamentary group launches probe into crypto sector's banking challenges | Telegram plans 'largest rollout of a non-custodial crypto wallet in human history' |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Daniel Kuhn

Happy Tuesday! *Bitcoin* is back above $66,000, though *Bitfinex* analysts caution that the rally is approaching a key $68,000 resistance zone, where underwater holders could sell at breakeven, as U.S. spot ETF flows stabilize and expectations for delayed *Fed* rate cuts leave the broader recovery on uncertain footing.

In today's newsletter, *Trump* agrees to *Clarity Act* ethics provisions, *Jack Mallers* steps down as *Twenty One* CEO, *Kalshi* faces another state-level setback, and more.

Meanwhile, *Malaysia* shuts down ( https://www.theblock.co/post/409076/malaysia-shuts-down-balaji-srinivasans-network-school-forest-city?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *Balaji Srinivasan's Network School* in *Forest City*.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read вҖ” and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*рҹ‘Җ Trump agrees to ethics provision as crypto bill inches closer to Senate vote*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/409000/trump-agrees-to-ethics-provision-crypto-bill?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*President Trump* agreed to ethics language for the *Clarity Act* , potentially clearing the final hurdle to passing comprehensive U.S. crypto legislation, an industry source told The Block.

* Ethics has been the last sticking point on the bill, which would regulate digital assets federally for the first time and split oversight between the *SEC* and *CFTC*.
* The provision would limit how presidents, members of Congress, and other federal officials can profit from digital assets while in office.
* The dispute centered on Trump's memecoins and his family's DeFi firm *World Liberty Financial* , whose disclosures last month showed he earned millions, intensifying the ethics debate.
* Bill text is expected in the coming days, though Democrats reportedly haven't seen it yet, with the Senate facing an early-August deadline to vote.
* If the Senate passes the bill, it heads back to the House before reaching Trump's desk.

READ FULL ARTICLE ( https://www.theblock.co/po

В DovoznГ© poplatky sa budГә vzЕҘahovaЕҘ na vЕЎetky poloЕҫky uvedenГ© v tomto e-maile alebo v rГЎmci tejto propagaДҚnej akcie, ktorГ© sa odosielajГә z krajГӯn mimo EГҡ. вҖҠ вҖҠ Sledujte nГЎs POZNГҒMKA: Toto je automaticky vygenerovanГҪ e-mail, neodpovedajte

76294.subject: RWAs are exploding: Here's the full DeFi Active TVL picture
76294.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/acbeaee3-d2ae-4169-b93e-128e14318f8e/top_binance.png?t=1784642038)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/research/report/binance-exchange-to-infrastructure-cexs-reshaping-global-market-access)
Caption: 

Welcome to the DefiLlama Newsletter. Each week we bring you the most valuable onchain insights from the the deepest DeFi dataset in the world.



Subscribe (https://newsletter.defillama.com)





TodayвҖҷs analysis features brand new [RWA Net Flow charts](https://defillama.com/rwa?chartType=flows&flowHeatmapSize=defiActiveTvl&flowRotationFrequency=daily). Use this tool to track where money is moving between RWAs over time. See flows between chains, asset groups, categories and platforms.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/62cf4898-2409-44d0-a8f2-6380b0f09dee/image.png?t=1784587718)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/rwa?chartType=flows&flowRotationBy=chain)
Caption: 

See Weekly RWA Flows (https://defillama.com/rwa?flowRotationView=heatmap&flowRotationFrequency=weekly&flowHeatmapSize=activeMcap&flowRotationBy=platform)

## RWAs see largest inflow day on record

RWAs just recorded the largest single day of inflows. $1.4b was added to [Franklin TempletonвҖҷs iBENJI](https://defillama.com/rwa/asset/iBENJI) on BSC (an institutional liquidity fund), a major contributor to RWAs having their first ever +$1b inflow day.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/b156ad49-bc55-4b79-83e7-7a2ab9c66a8e/rwa-time-series-chart-net-flows-all_2026-07-20__1_.png?t=1784581504)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/rwa?flowRotationFrequency=weekly&flowRotationBy=chain&chartType=flows)
Caption: 

This brings BSCвҖҷs Total RWA Onchain Market Cap to over $5b. Only EthereumвҖҷs RWA Onchain Mcap is higher, [owning over half the total market](https://defillama.com/rwa?chartType=flows&flowRotationView=heatmap&flowRotationBy=chain&flowRotationFrequency=weekly) at $16.3b onchain.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9e5ab7ec-06a7-42c7-b261-dcda4b67d269/rwa-net-flow-chain-weekly-heatmap_2026-07-20.png?t=1784582854)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/rwa?chartType=flows&flowRotationView=heatmap&flowRotationBy=chain&flowRotationFrequency=weekly)
Caption: RWA 7d Net Flow

## DeFi Active TVL recovers to all-time highs

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d5b02bd8-5aca-4bb8-9fc4-7381d019b60c/rwa-time-series-chart-defi-active-tvl-all_2026-07-21.png?t=1784646634)
Caption: 

During the rsETH exploit, Maple Finance proactively unwound syrupUSDC & syrupU
